name: Pasta Arrabbiata
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the chilis and garlic in olive oil until the garlic is fragrant.
2. Add the tomato sauce and passata along with salt and pepper.
3. Cook for 5 to 10 minutes.
4. Cook pasta until al dente and drain.
5. Serve pasta tossed with sauce and sprinkled with parsley.
